---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Etanercept 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Etanercept</strong> 目前有 <strong>2 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Etanercept 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Rheumatoid arthritis Nepexto in combination with methotrexate is indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe active rheumatoid arthritis in adults when the response to disease-modifying...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>ankylosing spondylitis（99.7%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid vasculitis（99.7%）</li>
<li>hypermobility of coccyx（99.6%）</li>
<li>inflammatory spondylopathy（99.6%）</li>
<li>spondyloarthropathy, susceptibility to（99.5%）</li>
<li>Kummell disease（99.5%）</li>
<li>polyarticular juvenile rheumatoid arthritis（99.5%）</li>
<li>vertebral disease（99.2%）</li>
<li>juvenile idiopathic arthritis（98.7%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid factor-positive polyarticular juvenile idiopathic arthritis（98.3%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（98.2%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid nodulosis（98.2%）</li>
<li>juvenile chronic polyarthritis（98.1%）</li>
<li>juvenile arthritis due to defect in LACC1（98.0%）</li>
<li>WHIM syndrome（97.7%）</li>
<li>mendelian susceptibility to mycobacterial diseases due to complete IL12B deficiency（97.0%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（96.8%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（96.7%）</li>
<li>leukoplakia（95.5%）</li>
<li>spondyloarthropathy（95.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
